content: Hii. Is there something I can help you with? You had asked earlier if a PDF had been uploaded, but I don't have any information about that.
ok, so tell me about myself from the pdf

Based on the context provided, it appears that the PDF contains information about Nirvan Jha, a Builder and AI Engineer. Here's a summary of what I found:

You are Nirvan Jha, a skilled professional with experience in developing autonomous workflows, scalable backend systems, and full-stack applications. You have a strong foundation in Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, and C++, and you're proficient in using various tools and technologies such as LangGraph, Docker, and AWS.

You have a Bachelor's degree in Mechanical Engineering from IIITDM Kancheepuram, Chennai, India, and you've worked as a Founding FullStack Developer at Outflo AI in Bangalore. You've also contributed to open-source projects as an AI and Systems contributor at RuxAILab.

Your technical skills include proficiency in languages like Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, and C++, as well as experience with agentic AI and LLMs, infrastructure and databases, and core competencies like agent orchestration, rapid prototyping, and systems design.

You've also achieved several notable accomplishments, including competing in the ET GenAI Hackathon 2026, solving over 600 problems on LeetCode, and winning the 1st Prize at Atomquest in 2026 for technical problem-solving and rapid development.

Is there anything specific you'd like to know or discuss about yourself based on this information?
give me the project links i made

Based on the context provided, here are the project links mentioned:

1. OutreachAI (Automation Framework) - GitHub (link not provided, but mentioned as available on GitHub)
2. RevenueGuard AI (ET GenAI Hackathon 2026) - No link provided
3. Scalable Video Transcoder - No link provided
4. RuxAILab - No link provided (but mentioned as a remote open-source contributor role)
5. LinkedIn profile - https://linkedin.com/in/nirvan-jha
6. GitHub profile - https://github.com/Nirvanjha2004

Please note that some links are not provided in the context, and I couldn't find any additional information about them. If you need more information or specific links, please let me know.
